mapper.select:
SELECT r.REQ_ID AS requestId, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS targetDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(o.END_DATE, r.TARGET_DATE), 23) AS endDate, r.REQ_TYPE AS reqType, r.REQ_GROUP AS reqGroup, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, r.STATUS AS requestStatus, te.EMP_CODE AS targetEmpCode, te.EMP_NAME AS targetEmpName, td.DEPT_NAME AS targetDeptName, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS startTimeType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS endTimeType, o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE AS changeShiftCode, s.SHIFT_NAME AS changeShiftName, a.STEP_NO AS myStepNo, a.STATUS AS myStatus, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), a.DECISION_AT, 120) AS myDecisionAt, a.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 a JOIN HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r ON a.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND a.REQ_ID = r.REQ_ID JOIN HRIMASTER01 te ON r.COMPANY = te.COMPANY AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = te.EMP_CODE LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 td ON te.COMPANY = td.COMPANY AND te.DEPT_CODE = td.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON r.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE WHERE a.COMPANY = #{company} AND a.APPROVER_EMP_CODE = #{approverEmpCode} AND a.STEP_TYPE = 'APPROVE' AND a.STATUS = #{stepStatus}
AND r.STATUS = 'SUBMITTED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 prev WHERE prev.COMPANY = a.COMPANY AND prev.REQ_ID = a.REQ_ID AND prev.STEP_TYPE = 'APPROVE' AND prev.STEP_NO < a.STEP_NO AND prev.STATUS <> 'APPROVED' )
AND r.REQ_TYPE IN ('연장', '조출연장')
AND r.REQ_TYPE = '휴일근무'
AND r.REQ_TYPE IN ('조퇴', '외근', '외출', '전반차', '후반차', '오전반차', '오후반차')
AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER'
AND ISNULL(o.END_DATE, r.TARGET_DATE) >= CAST(#{fromDate} AS DATE)
AND r.TARGET_DATE <= CAST(#{toDate} AS DATE)
AND te.EMP_CODE = #{empCode}
ORDER BY r.TARGET_DATE DESC, r.REQ_ID

SELECT r.REQ_ID AS requestId, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS targetDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(o.END_DATE, r.TARGET_DATE), 23) AS endDate, r.REQ_TYPE AS reqType, r.REQ_GROUP AS reqGroup, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, r.STATUS AS requestStatus, te.EMP_CODE AS targetEmpCode, te.EMP_NAME AS targetEmpName, td.DEPT_NAME AS targetDeptName, re.EMP_CODE AS requesterEmpCode, re.EMP_NAME AS requesterEmpName, rd.DEPT_NAME AS requesterDeptName, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS startTimeType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS endTimeType, o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE AS changeShiftCode, s.SHIFT_NAME AS changeShiftName, CASE WHEN absenceInfo.isAbsent = 1 THEN 'ABSENT' ELSE ISNULL(effectiveShift.SHIFT_CODE, '') END AS actualWorkCode, CASE WHEN absenceInfo.isAbsent = 1 THEN '결근' ELSE ISNULL(effectiveShift.SHIFT_NAME, '') END AS actualWorkName, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), ar.CHECK_IN, 108), 5) AS recordCheckIn, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), ar.CHECK_OUT, 108), 5) AS recordCheckOut, ar.WORK_MIN AS recordWorkMin, ar.OVERNIGHT_YN AS recordOvernightYn, ar.LATE_YN AS recordLateYn, ar.LATE_MIN AS recordLateMin FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r JOIN HRIMASTER01 te ON r.COMPANY = te.COMPANY AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = te.EMP_CODE LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 td ON te.COMPANY = td.COMPANY AND te.DEPT_CODE = td.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRIMASTER01 re ON r.COMPANY = re.COMPANY AND r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE = re.EMP_CODE LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 rd ON re.COMPANY = rd.COMPANY AND re.DEPT_CODE = rd.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON r.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON td.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND td.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE, COUNT(*) AS CYCLE_LEN FROM HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 GROUP BY COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE ) pdcount ON pm.COMPANY = pdcount.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pdcount.WORK_PATTERN_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pm.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, r.TARGET_DATE) % pdcount.CYCLE_LEN + pdcount.CYCLE_LEN) % pdcount.CYCLE_LEN + 1 ) LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 planShift ON pd.COMPANY = planShift.COMPANY AND pd.SHIFT_CODE = planShift.SHIFT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 ar ON r.COMPANY = ar.COMPANY AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = ar.EMP_CODE AND ar.YYYYMMDD = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), r.TARGET_DATE, 112) OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 offShift.SHIFT_CODE FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 offReq LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 offOther ON offOther.COMPANY = offReq.COMPANY AND offOther.REQ_ID = offReq.REQ_ID JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 offShift ON offShift.COMPANY = offReq.COMPANY AND ( (offReq.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' AND offShift.SHIFT_CODE = offOther.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE AND offReq.TARGET_DATE <= r.TARGET_DATE AND offOther.END_DATE >= r.TARGET_DATE) OR (offReq.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL' AND offReq.TARGET_DATE = r.TARGET_DATE AND (offShift.SHIFT_CODE = offReq.REQ_TYPE OR offShift.SHIFT_NAME = offReq.REQ_TYPE)) ) WHERE offReq.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND offReq.TARGET_EMP_CODE = r.TARGET_EMP_CODE AND offReq.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND offShift.WORK_TYPE_CODE = 'OFF' ORDER BY offReq.UPDATED_AT DESC, offReq.REQ_ID DESC ) approvedOffShift OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 noRecordShift.SHIFT_CODE FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 noRecordReq LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 noRecordOther ON noRecordOther.COMPANY = noRecordReq.COMPANY AND noRecordOther.REQ_ID = noRecordReq.REQ_ID JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 noRecordShift ON noRecordShift.COMPANY = noRecordReq.COMPANY AND ( (noRecordReq.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' AND noRecordShift.SHIFT_CODE = noRecordOther.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE AND noRecordReq.TARGET_DATE <= r.TARGET_DATE AND noRecordOther.END_DATE >= r.TARGET_DATE) OR (noRecordReq.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL' AND noRecordReq.TARGET_DATE = r.TARGET_DATE AND (noRecordShift.SHIFT_CODE = noRecordReq.REQ_TYPE OR noRecordShift.SHIFT_NAME = noRecordReq.REQ_TYPE)) ) WHERE noRecordReq.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND noRecordReq.TARGET_EMP_CODE = r.TARGET_EMP_CODE AND noRecordReq.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND noRecordShift.SHIFT_CODE IN ('10', '16') ORDER BY noRecordReq.UPDATED_AT DESC, noRecordReq.REQ_ID DESC ) approvedNoRecordShift OUTER APPLY ( SELECT COALESCE( NULLIF(ar.ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE, ''), NULLIF(approvedOffShift.SHIFT_CODE, ''), NULLIF(approvedNoRecordShift.SHIFT_CODE, ''), NULLIF(ar.SHIFT_CODE, ''), CASE WHEN r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' AND r.STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN NULLIF(o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE, '') END, NULLIF(planShift.SHIFT_CODE, '') ) AS SHIFT_CODE ) effectiveShiftCode LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 effectiveShift ON effectiveShift.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND effectiveShift.SHIFT_CODE = effectiveShiftCode.SHIFT_CODE OUTER APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN effectiveShift.SHIFT_CODE IN ('10', '16') OR ISNULL(effectiveShift.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '') IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY') OR effectiveShift.SHIFT_NAME LIKE '%휴가%' OR effectiveShift.SHIFT_NAME LIKE '%반차%' OR effectiveShift.SHIFT_NAME LIKE '%출장%' OR effectiveShift.SHIFT_NAME LIKE '%외출%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RECOGNIZED_NO_RECORD_YN ) effectiveShiftCalc OUTER APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN r.TARGET_DATE > CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN 0 WHEN ar.CHECK_IN IS NOT NULL THEN 0 WHEN CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(planShift.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(planShift.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY') THEN 0 WHEN approvedOffShift.SHIFT_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 0 WHEN effectiveShiftCalc.RECOGNIZED_NO_RECORD_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS isAbsent ) absenceInfo WHERE r.REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND r.COMPANY = #{company} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 a WHERE a.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND a.REQ_ID = r.REQ_ID AND a.APPROVER_EMP_CODE = #{approverEmpCode} AND a.STEP_TYPE = 'APPROVE' )
mapper.update: UPDATE HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 SET STATUS = 'REJECTED', DECISION_AT = GETDATE(), REJECT_REASON = #{rejectReason}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND STEP_NO = #{stepNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 a JOIN HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r ON r.COMPANY = a.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = a.REQ_ID WHERE a.COMPANY = #{company} AND a.APPROVER_EMP_CODE = #{approverEmpCode} AND a.STEP_TYPE = 'APPROVE' AND a.STATUS = 'PENDING' AND r.STATUS = 'SUBMITTED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 prev WHERE prev.COMPANY = a.COMPANY AND prev.REQ_ID = a.REQ_ID AND prev.STEP_NO < a.STEP_NO AND prev.STATUS != 'APPROVED' )
